arts.sum: Lille extended their unbeaten run to 17 matches when they beat Rouen in the Coupe de France prior to Christmas. Les Dogues will feel confident about extending that run when they face Nantes this weeke...

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: Do not doubt David
arts.sum: Jack Ogalbe has picked out five goalscorers to follow from across Europe over the coming days.
